creator: dohzono@gmail.com
text:
make stops just after configure with certain options.

$ cd /usr/ports/lang/ruby18
$ make

=> MD5 Checksum OK for ruby/ruby-1.8.6.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for ruby/ruby-1.8.6.tar.bz2.

/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/lang/ruby18/work/ruby-1.8.6/bin/
===>  Patching for ruby+pthreads+oniguruma-1.8.6,1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for ruby+pthreads+oniguruma-1.8.6,1
/usr/bin/sed -i.bak -e 's|-l$pthread_lib|-pthread|g' 
/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/lang/ruby18/work/ruby-1.8.6/configure
/bin/rm -rf /usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/lang/ruby18/work/ruby-1.8.6/ext/Win32API

/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/lang/ruby18/work/

/usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.4 - found

cd `cd /usr/ports/devel/oniguruma; make -V WRKSRC`; ./configure;  make -f Makefile

How-To-Repeat: $ cd /usr/ports/lang/ruby18
$ make WITH_PTHREADS=true WITH_ONIGURUMA=true WITHOUT_GCPATCH=true WITH_IPV6=true WITHOUT_RDOC=true WITHOUT_DEBUG=true
